headline: Lithium-ion innovation shifts to longer-duration systems, boosting large-format cell adoption
summary: China continues to dominate the lithium-ion battery landscape, home to industry heavyweights such as CATL, as manufacturers push to extend battery duration and improve storage efficiency. headline: Wheaton Precious Metals to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: WPM heads into Q1 earnings release, with forecasts of sharp y/y sales and profit growth, fueled by stronger gold and silver prices, and higher output.

headline: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Says U.S. To 'Guide' Ships Through Hormuz
summary: The stock market rebounded late last week after a short pause. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq are at highs while Apple and Broadcom are in buy zones.
